name: hexa
description: /hexa <verb> [args...] — generic passthrough to the hexa CLI (`hexa $ARGUMENTS`). Covers the 80+ verbs not given a dedicated wrapper (run · build · test · parse · check · bench · qrng · sim-universe · qmirror · loop · tool · status · …). Dedicated wrappers (/kick /atlas /verify /cloud /hexa-help) take the hot paths; /hexa is the long-tail + future-verb fallback. Guarded passthrough: dedicated-wrapper verbs (cloud·deck·kick·atlas·verify) are refused + redirected to their dedicated skill so guards/preflight aren't bypassed. Routed to pool by pool-route like any hexa call. NL trigger via skill.
